subject: Adding helmchart for policy/pap component
commit_message:
Adding helmchart for policy/pap component

Change-Id: I134b9731bf5f72bd562d6abc3f759a9ef244bf27
Issue-ID: POLICY-1483
Signed-off-by: ramverma <ram.krishna.verma@est.tech>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Starting Chained-CI build

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/1636/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/1636

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained CI build failure on some jobs.
 jobs with issue:
  * name: apps_deploy:onap_oom_gating_pod4, url: https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation//-/jobs/167049314

Patch Set 1:

@Pam & Jorge - pls help in adding relevant person from OOM team here.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

I will add them, but it makes it easier for them if you dump output that things come up and work properly. eg. your test results.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Looks good Ram.   

A side note, the info in NOTES.txt I don't think is necessary and information is incorrect (I think this file is common practice to be pasted around, so it is all over).

Another observation is that in an ONAP OOM deployment, the pod name will show up in a deployment as "dev-policy-policy-pap".   I know that the OOM team preferred the <component> prefixed to the pod name in the past, and I think that's still their preference but a side effect is the double policy in an official installation.

As a note we have "policy-pap" and "pap" components, we may have to explain folks the difference.

Patch Set 1:

Jorge, perhaps we rename the old pap "legacy". We can discuss offline.

Mike and team, I think we are ready with this if you are ok with Ram's test results.
Change has been successfully merged by Borislav Glozman

Patch Set 1:

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-merge-helm/583/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-merge-helm/583
